question.question: We've spoken to the landlord, so we {a1} the new flat in June.

source.name: Custom: Will vs Be Going To All Levels (B1)

tag.name: Will vs Be Going To All Levels

variants.text: We've spoken to the landlord, so we {a1} the new flat in June.

hints.hint:
Form: **be going to + base verb**.
We use **be going to** when the plan, intention, or prior decision already existed before the moment of speaking.
Example: *We've spoken to the landlord, so we 're going to move into the new flat in June.*

Forma: **be going to + czasownik w formie podstawowej**.
Używamy **be going to**, gdy plan, zamiar albo wcześniejsza decyzja istniały już przed momentem mówienia.
Przykład: *We've spoken to the landlord, so we 're going to move into the new flat in June.*

Форма: **be going to + V1**.
Вживаємо **be going to**, коли план, намір або вже прийняте рішення існували до моменту мовлення.
Приклад: *We've spoken to the landlord, so we 're going to move into the new flat in June.*

chatgpt_explanations.question: We've spoken to the landlord, so we {a1} the new flat in June.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation:
✅ "'re going to" is correct because the action is already planned or the intention already exists. Here we need **be going to + base verb**.
Example: *We've spoken to the landlord, so we 're going to move into the new flat in June.*

chatgpt_explanations.question: We've spoken to the landlord, so we {a1} the new flat in June.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation:
✅ "'re going to" jest poprawne, bo działanie jest już zaplanowane albo zamiar już istnieje. Tutaj potrzebne jest **be going to + czasownik w formie podstawowej**.
Przykład: *We've spoken to the landlord, so we 're going to move into the new flat in June.*

chatgpt_explanations.question: We've spoken to the landlord, so we {a1} the new flat in June.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation:
✅ «'re going to» правильно, бо дія вже запланована або намір уже існує. Тут потрібне **be going to + V1**.
Приклад: *We've spoken to the landlord, so we 're going to move into the new flat in June.*

chatgpt_explanations.question: We've spoken to the landlord, so we {a1} the new flat in June.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation:
✅ «'re going to» правильно, бо дія вже запланована або намір уже існує. Тут потрібне **be going to + V1**.
Приклад: *We've spoken to the landlord, so we 're going to move into the new flat in June.*

chatgpt_explanations.question: We've spoken to the landlord, so we {a1} the new flat in June.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation:
❌ "going to" is incorrect because the structure **be going to** must include a form of **be**: *am / is / are*.
Example: *We've spoken to the landlord, so we 're going to move into the new flat in June.*

chatgpt_explanations.question: We've spoken to the landlord, so we {a1} the new flat in June.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation:
❌ "going to" jest niepoprawne, bo konstrukcja **be going to** musi zawierać odpowiednią formę czasownika **be**: *am / is / are*.
Przykład: *We've spoken to the landlord, so we 're going to move into the new flat in June.*

chatgpt_explanations.question: We've spoken to the landlord, so we {a1} the new flat in June.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation:
❌ «going to» неправильно, бо в конструкції **be going to** обов'язково потрібна форма дієслова **be**: *am / is / are*.
